meta.title: Kaustav Bhattacharya — Frontend Engineer
meta.description: Frontend engineer building fast, considered interfaces with React, Next.js and TypeScript.

hero.subtext: I build with React, Next.js and TypeScript — focused on performance, clean component architecture, and interfaces that hold up at scale.

bio.before: I'm a frontend engineer who likes taking systems from
bio.after: to production, at scale. Most of my time goes into React and Next.js codebases where correctness, latency, and maintainability actually matter — real-time dashboards, multi-tenant platforms, and interfaces that get hammered by thousands of concurrent users.

contact.heading: Looking for a frontend engineer who cares about the details?
contact.subtext: Open to full-time roles and select contract work. Fastest reply is over email.
